# Resume Specialist Agent — Revision History

This log records milestone upgrades and rationale.

## v1.2 — Seniority Classification (3 May 2026)
- Added seniority-classification framework (global rubric + profession overlays)
- Classifies CVs as Junior / Mid / Senior (with confidence and rationale)
- Integrated with scoring (uses content, scope, impact, leadership signals)

## v1.1 — Impact & Scoring Upgrade (3 May 2026)
- Business Impact Quantification framework
- Senior-Level Positioning framework
- CV Quality Scoring System (0–100)
- Actionable Items & Gap Prompts
- Guardrails/context gates enhanced (lean style, scope lines, brevity)

## v1.0 — Initial Release (3 May 2026)
- Core skill cards (language, digital, interpersonal, organizational, sector)
- Guardrails (tone/language, formatting, content constraints)
- Context gates (cv-structure, EU compliance, remote guidelines)
- Source-of-truth documentation and Quick Start guide
